data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding agent-specific rate limits.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior related to agent-specific rate limits. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific outcomes or traces that confirm the behavior of the system under these conditions. Without concrete evidence of the scenario's execution and its results, the requirement cannot be assessed, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of scenario execution or outcome related to agent-specific rate limits.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Capture scenario execution traces
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete steps to simulate the persona scenario and capture the expected outcomes.
